UAE Pricing

Transparent, Competitive Pricing

Competitive pricing tailored to UAE businesses. We provide transparent quotes based on your specific requirements, transaction volume, and free zone or mainland setup. No hidden fees.

Comprehensive Accounting Packages

Essential

AED 2,499/mo

Core accounting services for small UAE businesses

  • IFRS-compliant bookkeeping (up to 50 transactions)
  • Monthly management accounts
  • VAT registration & filing
  • Corporate tax compliance
  • Annual financial statements
  • Free zone compliance support
  • Email support
Get Quote
Most Popular

Professional

AED 4,999/mo

Complete accounting for growing UAE businesses

  • Everything in Essential
  • Bookkeeping (up to 200 transactions)
  • Payroll & WPS (up to 10 employees)
  • ESR & UBO compliance
  • Free zone audit preparation
  • Quarterly strategy calls
  • Priority support
  • Dedicated accountant
Get Quote

Enterprise

AED 8,999/mo

Full-service accounting for established UAE businesses

  • Everything in Professional
  • Unlimited transactions
  • Payroll & WPS (unlimited employees)
  • Multi-entity consolidation
  • CFO advisory hours
  • FTA audit support
  • 24/7 support access
  • Multi-free zone support
Get Quote

*All prices exclude 5% UAE VAT

AED 3,999/mo
